_meta.description: Gearing tips for alternative items. Notes explain WHY you'd pick an alt over the BiS piece. Spec-specific overrides take priority over global notes.

global.28034: Easy to farm — drops from Shadow Labyrinth. Great until you get a raid trinket.
global.28288: Drops from Mechanar — on-use haste is strong for burst windows.
global.28507: Karazhan drop. Solid until you get T5/T6 gloves.
global.28780: Prince drop. Great if you can't get tier gloves yet.
global.29381: Badge vendor. Pick this if you still need spell hit.
global.28672: Netherspite drop. Budget cloak — easy Kara farm.
global.27878: Heroic Auchenai Crypts. Easiest Pre-BiS cloak to farm.
global.19379: Classic Naxx item. Still competitive if you have it from vanilla.
global.23207: Classic Naxx item. Still very strong if you kept it from vanilla.
global.21670: Classic AQ40 item. Still competitive for physical DPS if you have it.
global.28509: Attumen (Karazhan) — easy weekly farm. Good if you're unlucky on other necks.
global.28757: Prince Malchezaar drop. Versatile ring — good for many specs.
global.29132: Scryers rep trinket. Free if you're already Scryers — no farming needed.
global.29247: Crafted (Leatherworking). Cheap to make, holds up well early on.
global.28545: Moroes (Karazhan) — easy weekly farm. Reliable melee boots.
global.28734: Nightbane (Karazhan). Versatile ring with stam + damage.
global.28797: Gruul's Lair trash drop. Might drop while you farm DST.
global.29382: Badge vendor. Quick to buy, solid physical DPS cloak.
global.29992: Kael'thas (TK). Great if it drops on your kill.
global.27892: Blackheart the Inciter (Shadow Lab). Easy dungeon farm.
global.28766: Prince Malchezaar drop. Excellent caster cloak from Kara.
global.25686: Crafted (Leatherworking). Very cheap — use while farming raid boots.
global.24259: Crafted (Leatherworking). Budget option while waiting for raid cloak.
global.24250: Crafted (Tailoring). Strong caster bracers — worth crafting early.
global.29273: Badge vendor. Quick pickup if you need an off-hand fast.
global.29994: Mag'theridon drop. Good cloak if you're running Mag weekly anyway.
global.30064: Lady Vashj (SSC). Great caster belt if it drops.
global.27683: Heroic Slave Pens. Very easy to farm — run it early and often.
global.28741: Shade of Aran (Karazhan). Solid legs from weekly Kara clear.
global.28828: Gruul drop. Good melee belt while farming your P2/P3 BiS.
global.30037: Crafted (Tailoring). Good if you have a Tailor friend or alt.
global.30626: Extremely strong when it procs — chase this from Serpentshrine.
global.29370: Badge vendor. One of the best uses of your early badges.
global.29383: Badge vendor. Strong physical DPS trinket — easy to get.
global.30723: Kael'thas (TK). Excellent caster weapon if you don't need a staff.
global.30734: Leotheras (SSC). Good legs if you haven't gotten your tier piece.
global.30898: Sethekk Halls quest. Free and easy to get.
global.32587: Crafted from Black Temple patterns. Best caster shoulders long-term.
global.30067: High Astromancer (TK). Good caster boots from early T5 content.
global.24262: Crafted (Tailoring). Spellstrike 2-set is very strong — keep both pieces.
global.24266: Crafted (Tailoring). Spellstrike 2-set with pants gives +92 spell damage.
global.24116: Crafted (Jewelcrafting). Requires JC to equip — strong if you have the profession.
global.29522: Crafted (Leatherworking). Windhawk 3-set gives mp5 — good early on.
global.29515: Crafted (Leatherworking). Ebon Netherscale — good for physical DPS.
global.29516: Crafted (Leatherworking). Part of Ebon Netherscale set.
global.30038: Crafted (Tailoring). Expensive but best caster belt for a long time.
global.32586: Crafted (Tailoring, BT pattern). Best caster bracers in the game.
global.29376: Badge vendor. Amazing healer trinket — prioritize buying this.
global.24256: Crafted (Tailoring). Girdle of Ruination — strong caster belt early.
global.31297: BoE world drop. Can be expensive on AH but no farming needed.
global.28411: PvP vendor. Easy to get if you have honor saved up.
global.28410: PvP vendor. Quick to get — decent until raid boots.
global.28555: Spirit Shard vendor. Easy to farm from Auchindoun heroics.
global.28343: Sethekk Halls drop. Easy dungeon to run for this neck.

Druid-Balance.24262: Spellstrike 2-set (Hood + Pants) gives +92 spell damage. Keep both until T6.
Druid-Balance.24266: Spellstrike 2-set (Hood + Pants). Worth keeping over most upgrades.
Druid-Balance.29522: Windhawk 3-set gives mp5. Pick this if mana is your bottleneck.
Druid-Balance.19379: Classic Naxx trinket. Still top-tier for balance if you have it.
Druid-Balance.29132: Scryers rep. Use this until you can buy the Badge trinket.

Druid-Bear.28034: Solid avoidance trinket. Use this on fights where you need less spike damage.
Druid-Bear.23207: Classic Naxx. The equip effect is enormous for bear threat + survivability.
Druid-Bear.28797: Gruul trash drop. Extra stam is valuable — use as your stam cloak.

Druid-Cat.28034: Good filler trinket. The crit proc helps with combo point generation.
Druid-Cat.25686: Super cheap to craft. Use these until you get Edgewalker Longboots.
Druid-Cat.29247: Cheap LW craft. Best early belt before raiding.

Hunter-Beast Mastery.28034: Strong proc trinket. Use alongside Bloodlust Brooch for burst phases.
Hunter-Beast Mastery.28228: Beast Lord 2-set reduces trap CD by 4 sec. Keep 2pc even with better individual pieces.
Hunter-Beast Mastery.28275: Beast Lord 2-set. Pair with chest for the trap CD reduction.
Hunter-Beast Mastery.29515: Ebon Netherscale. Good pre-raid option if you have Leatherworking.
Hunter-Beast Mastery.31303: Quest reward bow. Easy to get — use until you get a raid weapon.

Hunter-Survival.28228: Beast Lord 2-set is critical for Survival's CC rotation. Don't break it.
Hunter-Survival.28275: Keep for 2-set bonus — trap CD reduction is core to Survival gameplay.
Hunter-Survival.28034: Pairs well with your trap rotation. Good until raid trinkets.

Mage-Fire.24262: Spellstrike 2-set. +92 spell damage is hard to beat — keep until T6.
Mage-Fire.24266: Spellstrike 2-set. Keep both pieces together for the set bonus.
Mage-Fire.29132: Free from Scryers rep. Use until you can afford Badge trinkets.
Mage-Fire.27683: Easy heroic farm. Good filler trinket for spell haste.

Mage-Arcane.24262: Spellstrike 2-set. The flat spell damage is even better for Arcane than Fire.
Mage-Arcane.24266: Spellstrike 2-set. Don't break it for minor upgrades.
Mage-Arcane.30626: Incredible when it procs — chase this drop.

Warlock-Destruction.24262: Spellstrike 2-set is massive for Destro. Keep until Sunwell gear.
Warlock-Destruction.24266: Spellstrike 2-set. The raw spell damage feeds your Shadow Bolts hard.
Warlock-Destruction.19379: Classic trinket. Still BiS-level for Destro if you have it.

Warlock-Affliction.24262: Spellstrike 2-set works well with DoTs. Keep for the flat spell damage.
Warlock-Affliction.19379: Neltharion's Tear. Still strong for Affliction — spell pen is useful in PvP too.

Priest-Shadow.24262: Spellstrike 2-set. Raw spell damage boosts all your DoTs + Mind Blast.
Priest-Shadow.24266: Spellstrike 2-set. Worth crafting early — stays relevant through T5.
Priest-Shadow.29132: Scryers Bloodgem. Free trinket — use until Badge of Justice options.
Priest-Shadow.27683: Quag's Eye. Easy heroic farm, and the haste helps with clipping.

Rogue-Dps.28034: Hourglass. Solid crit proc — use alongside DST for double-proc burst.
Rogue-Dps.28288: Abacus. The haste on-use lines up with Blade Flurry nicely.
Rogue-Dps.25686: Cheap LW boots. Wear these until you get Edgewalker Longboots from Kara.
Rogue-Dps.28509: Easy Attumen farm. Good neck until you can get a T5/T6 necklace.
Rogue-Dps.28545: Moroes drop. Reliable melee boots from weekly Kara.

Warrior-Fury.28034: Hourglass. Great crit proc — use as your second trinket slot.
Warrior-Fury.28288: Abacus. Haste on-use is amazing for Execute phase.
Warrior-Fury.28509: Attumen drop. Reliable neck from weekly Kara clear.
Warrior-Fury.28828: Gruul drop. Decent belt while farming for Vashj/BT belts.

Warrior-Arms.28034: Hourglass. Crit proc synergizes with Mortal Strike crits.
Warrior-Arms.28288: Abacus. Use the on-use for burst windows with Sweeping Strikes.

Warrior-Protection.28034: Pick this for threat-sensitive fights where you need DPS trinket.
Warrior-Protection.28797: Gruul trash. The stam makes it a solid mitigation cloak.

Paladin-Holy.29376: Badge vendor. Best throughput trinket — prioritize buying this.
Paladin-Holy.28766: Prince drop. Good caster cloak with healing stats.

Paladin-Retribution.28034: Hourglass. Great for melee — use until you get DST.
Paladin-Retribution.28288: Abacus. Haste on-use synergizes with Seal of Command procs.

Shaman-Enhancement.28034: Hourglass. Your second-best trinket option after DST.
Shaman-Enhancement.28288: Abacus. Haste is king for Enhancement — use on-use with Stormstrike.
Shaman-Enhancement.25686: Cheap LW craft. Use until you get Edgewalker Longboots.
Shaman-Enhancement.28509: Attumen drop. Easy to farm — solid neck.

Shaman-Elemental.29132: Scryers rep. Free spell damage trinket — good starting point.
Shaman-Elemental.27683: Quag's Eye. Easy heroic — spell haste is great for Ele.

Shaman-Restoration.29376: Badge vendor. Amazing healer trinket — buy this first with badges.
Shaman-Restoration.28766: Prince drop. Good healer cloak from Kara.
